title: Bangkok Business Trip After Covid
summary: A first business trip after more than two years of pandemic restrictions, returning to Bangkok for office setup work, regional relationships, and the familiar energy of Thailand's land of smiles.

title: Singapore TBWA Events
summary: A Singapore work memory from the TBWA\Group farewell lunch and events, marking 19 years of shared laughter, growth, pirate spirit, and close team relationships.

title: Genting Camping Mountain Reset
summary: A personal mountain reset from the yearly camping trip at Rainforest Park and Rainforest Campsite Genting, with five old friends, fresh air, and a slower rhythm away from daily work.
